innateAbility.name: Necromastery
innateAbility.description: Grants bonus attack damage per stack from unit kills, and loses a portion of stacks upon death.

abilities.name: Shadowraze
abilities.description: Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.Has no stack limit.

abilities.name: Feast of Souls
abilities.description: Grants self bonus movement speed and bonus attack speed upon cast.

abilities.name: Presence of the Dark Lord
abilities.description: Reduces the armor of enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Requiem of Souls
abilities.description: Gathers his captured souls to release them as lines of demonic energy, units near Nevermore can be damaged by several lines of energy.Enemy units damaged are feared, and have both its movement speed and magic resistance reduced with a duration based on each line hit.

talents.right: +30% Feast of Souls Cast Animation Speed

talents.left: +0.2s Requiem of Souls Debuff Duration per Line
+2 Feast of Souls Necromastery Stack per Hero
talents.right: +2 Presence of the Dark Lord Armor Reduction
